TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Joko Widodo == I 1961 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joko Widodo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Indonesia anini i ci Joko Widodo, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Nai 2005 tangasa i 2012 a miheca malakakelidan no Solaciyata , itini to 2012 tangasa to 2014 malakakelidan no Yaciata . laloma'an 家庭 I 1986 miheca malalamod aci Iliyana (Iriana), I 1988 miheca saka 10 folad saka 1 romi'ad ci wawa to fainayan ci Kiporan Rakapoming Raka (Gibran Rakabuming Raka), i 1991 miheca saka 4 folda saka 20 romi'ad ci wawa to fafahiyan ci Kahiyang Awo (Kahiyang Ayu), i 1994 miheca saka 12folad saka 25 romi'ad ci wawa ho to fainayan ci Kasang Pangarep (Kaesang Pangarep). O wawa ningra tatos mitiliday i Sinkapor. Sasepay to ko suna ni Joko Widodo. Pasifana' 教育 lalamod 配偶 Ci Iriyana (Iriana) ko fafahi ni Jokowi, i 1963 miheca saka mo^etep a folad ko kahofocan nira, 2014 miheca saka mo^etep a folad, malafahahi tono congtong ci Jokowian, Yamala kakeridan ho no Yiciyata a niyaro' i, O kakeridan no sakanga'ayay no kilomaan to palatamdaway a katayalan , to ci Lliyana, ono Intonisiya kapolongan no onto no fafahiyan. itini to 2005 miheca tangasa i 2012 miheca, matayal a malakakeridan tono Solakaeta , ttiya ho o 市長 no Solakaeta ci Jokowi. pitooran 宗教 mikapot to sieci 加入政治 I 2012 a miheca saka polo' a folad mikomod ci Ciyokowi, mikelid misafa^loh to Yaciyata , itiya iraay ko mirarakatay a mipatenakay to sowal, ano mirarakat ko malatapangay i, o misatengitengilay to ngiha no finawlan, ano ira ko kacango'otang no i niyaro'ay, padama'en to ni Ciyokowi. Falicen nira ko tatiihay a demak no citodongay, milowan to caay ka fangcal a pinangan. Oromasato misafangcal to 'orip no tamdamdaw, mipatireng to sakanga'ay no paisingan ato misakapah to lalan no nanom, caay to mamiliyaw a ira ko lenlen, mipatireng to pirakatan no seraay a marad. natayalan 事蹟 Mikomod a mamisinkiw ci Jokowi i, alomanay ko maolahay cingraan, itini tona PDI-P hananay, o tadacifenekay a tamdaw cingra. Aloman aloman ko mitopaay cingraan, tayni sato i 2014 a miheca saka 7 a folad 22 a romi'ad ko pikomod ningra to mamalacontong, caay ka pihai koya ci Polapaw Sopianto , maketer cingra, sowal sa
S.PHON: == *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u == i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u inɬ~ɮo~unəsia anini i ʦi *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. nai **** taŋasa i **** a miħəʦa maɾakakəɾiɬ~ɮan no~u so~uɾaʦijata , itini to~u **** taŋasa to~u **** maɾakakəɾiɬ~ɮan no~u jaʦiata . ɾaɾo~umaʡan ** i **** miħəʦa maɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi iɾijana (iriana), i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wawa to~u fainajan ʦi kipo~uran rakapo~umiŋ raka (*ib~b~vran rakab~b~vo~u~umiŋ raka), i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾɬ~ɮa saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wawa to~u fafaħijan ʦi kaħijaŋ awo~u (kaħijaŋ ajo~u~u), i **** miħəʦa saka **fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wawa ħo~u to~u fainajan ʦi kasaŋ paŋarəp (kaəsaŋ paŋarəp). o~u wawa niŋra tato~us mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i sinkapo~ur. sasəpaj to~u ko~u so~u~una ni *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u. pasifanaʡ ** ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** ʦi irijana (iriana) ko~u fafaħi ni *o~uko~uwi, i **** miħəʦa saka mo~uʔətəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan nira, **** miħəʦa saka mo~uʔətəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾafaħaħi to~uno~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *o~uko~uwian, jamaɾa kakəriɬ~ɮan ħo~u no~u jiʦijata a nijaro~uʡ i, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u sakaŋaʡajaj no~u kiɾo~umaan to~u paɾatamɬ~ɮawaj a katajaɾan , to~u ʦi ɾɾijana, o~uno~u into~unisija kapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u o~unto~u no~u fafaħijan. itini to~u **** miħəʦa taŋasa i **** miħəʦa, matajaɾ a maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan to~uno~u so~uɾakaəta , ttija ħo~u o~u ** no~u so~uɾakaəta ʦi *o~uko~uwi. pito~uo~uran ** mikapo~ut to~u siəʦi **** i **** a miħəʦa saka po~uɾo~uʡ a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ miko~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦijo~uko~uwi, mikəɾiɬ~ɮ misafaʔɾo~uħ to~u jaʦijata , itija iraaj ko~u mirarakataj a mipatənakaj to~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u mirarakat ko~u maɾatapaŋaj i, o~u misatəŋitəŋiɾaj to~u ŋiħa no~u finawɾan, ano~u ira ko~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~utaŋ no~u i nijaro~uʡaj, paɬ~ɮamaʡən to~u ni ʦijo~uko~uwi. faɾiʦən nira ko~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, miɾo~uwan to~u ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a pinaŋan. o~uro~umasato~u misafaŋʦaɾ to~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, mipatirəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u paisiŋan ato~u misakapaħ to~u ɾaɾan no~u nano~um, ʦaaj to~u mamiɾijaw a ira ko~u ɾənɾən, mipatirəŋ to~u pirakatan no~u səraaj a maraɬ~ɮ. natajaɾan ** miko~umo~uɬ~ɮ a mamisinkiw ʦi *o~uko~uwi i, aɾo~umanaj ko~u mao~uɾaħaj ʦiŋraan, itini to~una pɬ~ɮi-p ħananaj, o~u taɬ~ɮaʦifənəkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra. aɾo~uman aɾo~uman ko~u mito~upaaj ʦiŋraan, tajni sato~u i **** a miħəʦa saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u piko~umo~uɬ~ɮ niŋra to~u mamaɾaʦo~unto~uŋ, ʦaaj ka piħai ko~uja ʦi po~uɾapaw so~upianto~u , makətər ʦiŋra, so~uwaɾ sa
S.FORM: == Joko Widodo == I 1961 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joko Widodo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Indonesia anini i ci Joko Widodo, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Nai 2005 tangasa i 2012 a miheca malakakelidan no Solaciyata , itini to 2012 tangasa to 2014 malakakelidan no Yaciata . laloma'an 家庭 I 1986 miheca malalamod aci Iliyana (Iriana), I 1988 miheca saka 10 folad saka 1 romi'ad ci wawa to fainayan ci Kiporan Rakapoming Raka (Gibran Rakabuming Raka), i 1991 miheca saka 4 folda saka 20 romi'ad ci wawa to fafahiyan ci Kahiyang Awo (Kahiyang Ayu), i 1994 miheca saka 12folad saka 25 romi'ad ci wawa ho to fainayan ci Kasang Pangarep (Kaesang Pangarep). O wawa ningra tatos mitiliday i Sinkapor. Sasepay to ko suna ni Joko Widodo. Pasifana' 教育 lalamod 配偶 Ci Iriyana (Iriana) ko fafahi ni Jokowi, i 1963 miheca saka mo^etep a folad ko kahofocan nira, 2014 miheca saka mo^etep a folad, malafahahi tono congtong ci Jokowian, Yamala kakeridan ho no Yiciyata a niyaro' i, O kakeridan no sakanga'ayay no kilomaan to palatamdaway a katayalan , to ci Lliyana, ono Intonisiya kapolongan no onto no fafahiyan. itini to 2005 miheca tangasa i 2012 miheca, matayal a malakakeridan tono Solakaeta , ttiya ho o 市長 no Solakaeta ci Jokowi. pitooran 宗教 mikapot to sieci 加入政治 I 2012 a miheca saka polo' a folad mikomod ci Ciyokowi, mikelid misafa^loh to Yaciyata , itiya iraay ko mirarakatay a mipatenakay to sowal, ano mirarakat ko malatapangay i, o misatengitengilay to ngiha no finawlan, ano ira ko kacango'otang no i niyaro'ay, padama'en to ni Ciyokowi. Falicen nira ko tatiihay a demak no citodongay, milowan to caay ka fangcal a pinangan. Oromasato misafangcal to 'orip no tamdamdaw, mipatireng to sakanga'ay no paisingan ato misakapah to lalan no nanom, caay to mamiliyaw a ira ko lenlen, mipatireng to pirakatan no seraay a marad. natayalan 事蹟 Mikomod a mamisinkiw ci Jokowi i, alomanay ko maolahay cingraan, itini tona PDI-P hananay, o tadacifenekay a tamdaw cingra. Aloman aloman ko mitopaay cingraan, tayni sato i 2014 a miheca saka 7 a folad 22 a romi'ad ko pikomod ningra to mamalacontong, caay ka pihai koya ci Polapaw Sopianto , maketer cingra, sowal sa
S.PHON: == *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u == i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u inɬ~ɮo~unəsia anini i ʦi *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. nai **** taŋasa i **** a miħəʦa maɾakakəɾiɬ~ɮan no~u so~uɾaʦijata , itini to~u **** taŋasa to~u **** maɾakakəɾiɬ~ɮan no~u jaʦiata . ɾaɾo~umaʡan ** i **** miħəʦa maɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi iɾijana (iriana), i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wawa to~u fainajan ʦi kipo~uran rakapo~umiŋ raka (*ib~b~vran rakab~b~vo~u~umiŋ raka), i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾɬ~ɮa saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wawa to~u fafaħijan ʦi kaħijaŋ awo~u (kaħijaŋ ajo~u~u), i **** miħəʦa saka **fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦi wawa ħo~u to~u fainajan ʦi kasaŋ paŋarəp (kaəsaŋ paŋarəp). o~u wawa niŋra tato~us mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i sinkapo~ur. sasəpaj to~u ko~u so~u~una ni *o~uko~u wiɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u. pasifanaʡ ** ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** ʦi irijana (iriana) ko~u fafaħi ni *o~uko~uwi, i **** miħəʦa saka mo~uʔətəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan nira, **** miħəʦa saka mo~uʔətəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾafaħaħi to~uno~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *o~uko~uwian, jamaɾa kakəriɬ~ɮan ħo~u no~u jiʦijata a nijaro~uʡ i, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u sakaŋaʡajaj no~u kiɾo~umaan to~u paɾatamɬ~ɮawaj a katajaɾan , to~u ʦi ɾɾijana, o~uno~u into~unisija kapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u o~unto~u no~u fafaħijan. itini to~u **** miħəʦa taŋasa i **** miħəʦa, matajaɾ a maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan to~uno~u so~uɾakaəta , ttija ħo~u o~u ** no~u so~uɾakaəta ʦi *o~uko~uwi. pito~uo~uran ** mikapo~ut to~u siəʦi **** i **** a miħəʦa saka po~uɾo~uʡ a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ miko~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦijo~uko~uwi, mikəɾiɬ~ɮ misafaʔɾo~uħ to~u jaʦijata , itija iraaj ko~u mirarakataj a mipatənakaj to~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u mirarakat ko~u maɾatapaŋaj i, o~u misatəŋitəŋiɾaj to~u ŋiħa no~u finawɾan, ano~u ira ko~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~utaŋ no~u i nijaro~uʡaj, paɬ~ɮamaʡən to~u ni ʦijo~uko~uwi. faɾiʦən nira ko~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, miɾo~uwan to~u ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a pinaŋan. o~uro~umasato~u misafaŋʦaɾ to~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, mipatirəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u paisiŋan ato~u misakapaħ to~u ɾaɾan no~u nano~um, ʦaaj to~u mamiɾijaw a ira ko~u ɾənɾən, mipatirəŋ to~u pirakatan no~u səraaj a maraɬ~ɮ. natajaɾan ** miko~umo~uɬ~ɮ a mamisinkiw ʦi *o~uko~uwi i, aɾo~umanaj ko~u mao~uɾaħaj ʦiŋraan, itini to~una pɬ~ɮi-p ħananaj, o~u taɬ~ɮaʦifənəkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra. aɾo~uman aɾo~uman ko~u mito~upaaj ʦiŋraan, tajni sato~u i **** a miħəʦa saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u piko~umo~uɬ~ɮ niŋra to~u mamaɾaʦo~unto~uŋ, ʦaaj ka piħai ko~uja ʦi po~uɾapaw so~upianto~u , makətər ʦiŋra, so~uwaɾ sa
